Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jill B. Rowe, Esq., of Cooper White & Cooper, Tel. 415.433.1900, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER COOPER, WHITE & COOPER LLP'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
